spec.title: Total requests
spec.description: Total requests handled in the selected time range.

spec.title: Requests per second
spec.description: Rate of requests handled per second in the selected time range.

spec.title: Median response duration
spec.description: Median time-to-first-byte response duration for the selected time range.

spec.title: Median response size
spec.description: Median returned response body size in bytes in the selected time range.

spec.title: Total requests size
spec.description: Sum of the sizes of all received requests in the selected time range.

spec.title: Total responses size
spec.description: Sum of sizes of all response bodies in the selected time range.

spec.title: 4xx response percentage
spec.description: Percentage of responses with 4xx status code in all responses.

spec.title: 5xx response percentage
spec.description: Percentage of responses with 4xx status code in all responses.

spec.title: Rate of requests by HTTP method (stacked)
Median request duration
spec.description: Median round-trip request duration for the selected time range.

spec.title: Median request size
spec.description: Median request (estimated) size in bytes in the selected time range. Includes body.

spec.title: Total middleware errors
spec.description: A number of middleware errors encountered while handling requests in the selected time range.

spec.title: Requests in flight
spec.description: The number of requests currently being handled by the server.
